message:
fix: correct gtag date format and exclude forks from star count

Two targeted fixes:

1. components/analytics.tsx:
   - Fix gtag("js", ...) call to pass Date object instead of ISO string
   - Google Analytics expects a Date object, not a string representation
   - This was causing the "js" command to receive incorrect data

2. lib/github-stats.ts:
   - Add fork field to GitHubRepo interface
   - Skip forked repositories when counting total stars
   - Forks inherit star counts from original repos and shouldn't be
     double-counted in the user's total star aggregation
   - This gives a more accurate representation of original work

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
